$comment: UK consumer car catalog by make → models with year ranges. Covers every major brand sold in the UK 2015-2026 at the model level (not trim level). Compiled from manufacturer UK websites, AutoTrader/Whatcar listings, and SMMT registration stats. Maintainable: when a new model launches, append; when a model is discontinued, set 'to' to the final year.
source_note: Curated UK consumer-car catalog. Live data sources (DVLA, CAP HPI, SMMT) are either per-registration only or behind paid licences — this file is the project's canonical UK lineup until a free public catalog API exists.
